title: Performance Optimization Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on performance optimization strategies across the full stack.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a Content Delivery Network (CDN)?
options: To minimize CSS and JavaScript files
To distribute static assets to servers closer to the user
To perform server-side caching of database queries
To implement lazy loading of images

questions.question: Which tool would you use to profile an application and identify bottlenecks?
